name: Burnt Sugar Frosting (Caramel Icing)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine 1/2 cup sugar and butter in a saucepan over medium heat.
2. Cook until the mixture turns caramel brown, stirring occasionally.
3. Remove from heat and add boiling water. Stir to dissolve the sugar completely.
4. Add milk, salt, and remaining sugar to the pan.
5. Return to low heat and cook, stirring constantly, until the temperature reaches 236°F (112°C).
6. Remove from heat and let cool to room temperature.
7. Stir in vanilla extract.
8. Beat the frosting with an electric mixer until it becomes thick enough to spread on a cake.
9. Spread over the cake and, if desired, sprinkle chopped nuts on top.
